```py
X_orig, y_orig = sklearn.make_classification(
    n_samples=1000,
    n_features=500,
    n_informative=5,
    n_redundant=50, # LOTS of redundant features correlated with informative
    n_repeated=0,
    n_clusters_per_class=1,
    flip_y=0.3, # Some label noise
    class_sep=0.0001,
    random_state=42
)
```
